top_risks: ERN-RISK-001 [Immediate] Missing MFA on Administrative Access
ERN-RISK-002 [High] PHI Database Encryption at Rest
top_remediations: Implement multi-factor authentication for all administrative and privileged access.
Review and remediate based on security best practices.
compliance_overview: Architecture intersects with 2 regulatory frameworks: HIPAA, HITRUST. Each framework requires validation of applicable controls and evidence collection.
